# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- name: my-instance-template
  type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
  properties:
    properties:
      machineType: n1-standard-1
      disks:
      - boot: true
        autoDelete: true
        initializeParams:
          sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-10
      networkInterfaces:
      - network: global/networks/default

- name: my-instance-group
  type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
  properties:
    baseInstanceName: my-instance
    instanceTemplate: $(ref.my-instance-template.selfLink)
    targetSize: 2
    zone: us-central1-a

- name: my-cloud-sql-instance
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    region: us-central
    settings:
      tier: db-f1-micro
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true

- name: my-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD

- name: my-http-health-check
  type: compute.v1.httpHealthCheck
  properties:
    host: ""
    requestPath: "/"
    port: 80

- name: my-target-pool
  type: compute.v1.targetPool
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.my-http-health-check.selfLink)
    instances:
    - $(ref.my-instance-group.instance)

- name: my-fw-rule
  type: compute.v1.forwardingRule
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    ipProtocol: TCP
    portRange: 80
    target: $(ref.my-target-pool.selfLink)

- name: my-backend-service
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL
    backends:
    - group: $(ref.my-instance-group.instance)
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.my-http-health-check.selfLink)

- name: my-url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultService: $(ref.my-backend-service.selfLink)

- name: my-http-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.my-url-map.selfLink)

- name: my-glb
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    ipProtocol: TCP
    portRange: 80
    target: $(ref.my-http-proxy.selfLink)
